name: Danakali Limited
description: Danakali Limited is an exploration and development company focused on the Colluli Potash Project located in the Danakil Depression region of Eritrea, East Africa. The project is a joint venture between Danakali and the Eritrean National Mining Corporation (ENAMCO). Colluli is one of the most advanced potash projects globally, with a massive resource of premium-quality sulfate of potash (SOP), a chloride-free fertilizer essential for high-value crops.
